name: ModelHandler
summary: The ModelHandler class provides information about the currently open Tekla Structures model.

methods.name: CreateNewMultiUserModel
methods.signature: public bool CreateNewMultiUserModel(string ModelName, string ModelFolder, string ServerName)

params.name: ModelName
params.doc: The name for the new model.

params.name: ModelFolder
params.doc: The folder path for the new model.

methods.name: CreateNewSingleUserModel
methods.signature: public bool CreateNewSingleUserModel(string ModelName, string ModelFolder, string TemplateNameOrTemplatePath = "")
methods.summary: Creates a new single user model.

params.name: ModelName
params.doc: The name for the new model.

params.name: ModelFolder
params.doc: The folder path for the new model.

params.name: TemplateNameOrTemplatePath
params.doc: The optional template name for the new model.

methods.name: IsModelAutoSaved
methods.summary: Tells whether a model has auto saved information.

params.name: ModelFolder
params.doc: The model folder path to be used.

returns.doc: True if there is auto saved information.

methods.name: IsModelSaved
methods.summary: Tells whether current model has been saved.

returns.doc: True if there are no unsaved changes in the model.

methods.name: Open
methods.signature: public bool Open(string ModelFolder, bool OpenAutoSaved = false)
methods.summary: Opens a new model to Tekla Structures without saving changes to current model.

params.name: ModelFolder
params.doc: The model folder path to be used.

params.name: OpenAutoSaved
params.doc: Tells whether to open auto saved information or not. Optional parameter, default = false

methods.name: Save(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool Save(string Comment = "", string User = "")
methods.summary: Saves current model with comment and user information.

params.name: Comment
params.doc: The comment for save operation, used only with multi-user models.

params.name: User
params.doc: The user identification, used only with multi-user models.

methods.name: Save(String, String, String)
methods.signature: public bool Save(string Comment, string User, string Reason)
methods.summary: Saves current model with comment and user information.

params.name: Comment
params.doc: The comment for save operation, used only with multi-user models.

params.name: User
params.doc: The user identification, used only with multi-user models.

params.name: Reason
params.doc: The reason why this model save is being called. Used for identifying model save events.
